activity_name: Record the data of the patient

substeps.description: Access the Hospital Information System (HIS).
Navigate to the 'New Patient Registration' module.
Enter basic demographic information (e.g., date of birth, gender, address) into the HIS.
Save the initial patient record in the HIS.

activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

substeps.description: Request the patient's Social Security Number (SSN).
Enter the patient's SSN into the designated field in the HIS.
Verify the entered SSN for accuracy against the provided information.

activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

substeps.description: Request the patient's official identification (e.g., driver's license, passport).
Read the patient's legal first and middle name(s) from the official ID.
Enter the patient's legal first and middle name(s) into the HIS.

activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

substeps.description: Read the patient's family name from the official identification.
Enter the patient's family name into the HIS.
Navigate to the 'Print Documents' section in the HIS.
Select the 'Registration Confirmation' document template.
Generate the registration confirmation document.
Send the document to the printer.
Retrieve the printed registration confirmation document from the printer.
Scan the completed physical registration documents using the document scanner.
Verify the scanned image quality and completeness.
Upload the scanned documents to the designated digital archive in the HIS.
File the physical registration documents in the secure storage location.
